---
title: "Subhasish Mukherjee"
about:
  template: trestles
  # image: profile.jpg          # drop a photo in the repo root and uncomment
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: "https://github.com/YOUR_GITHUB_USERNAME"   # ← set me
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:subhasish.m.9@gmail.com"
---

I am a mathematics PhD student. My interests include <!-- e.g. metric geometry,
optimal transport, and applications to urban structure -->.

This site collects my [projects](projects/index.qmd) and
[papers & reports](papers/index.qmd).

## Recently

- **[StreetSphere](/streetsphere/)** — street-network orientation as probability
  measures on $\mathbb{RP}^2$: Wasserstein distances between cities, hilliness,
  walkability, and staircase censuses across 84 world cities, with an interactive
  dashboard.
